name: 05-13-brand-fablemap-shell-consistency
title: Brand: FableMap shell consistency — replace SoulLink metaphor
description: Replace SoulLink/node/network signal-themed shell UI with FableMap/map-anchored tavern metaphors. Audit and rename all visible SoulLink references in home, discover, and tavern routes.
creator: claude
notes: Completed brand shell consistency pass. Visitor-facing home/discover/tavern-adjacent copy no longer exposes SoulLink/signal/online-entity wording; stable internal mini-game IDs retained for contract tests. Validation passed: frontend typecheck/test/build, backend compileall, focused scene capsule/orchestrator pytest. Current frontend specs synced for renamed activity summary helper/card.
